title: Trailer Experience
description: [I AM working on it (hopefully)] Make minecraft look EVEN MORE like the trailers!
body:
# Axl0's Trailer Experience 
## Experience Minecraft like never before with Axl0's Trailer Experience modpack!
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3307e3eda1d54054497d88ec459282e6f76977d1.png)

Based off [Trailer Recreation++](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-recreation++)
### Overview:
Explore a visually stunning rendition of Minecraft that mirrors the captivating trailers you've seen. This modpack is meticulously crafted to elevate your gameplay visuals to cinematic heights, transforming your world into a breathtaking spectacle.

### Features:
#### Resource Packs:
- Bare Bones: Minecraft with the style of the trailers.
#### Shader Packs:
- Complementary Reimagined: Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance. (Settings by [NotAGanesh](https://modrinth.com/user/NotAGanesh))
- BSL Shaders: Shaderpack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful, and distinct. (Settings by [LowResBones](https://modrinth.com/user/lowresbones))

# Promises
## Claims
- The most performant Trailer Pack out there!
- The one closest to the feelings of the trailers
- The one recieving the most frequent updates
## Proofs
- Based off [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), the leading performance modpack
- Because we are based on Quilt, we are able to get Fabric mods *and* Quilt mods (like [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective))
- I can't really prove that, all you can do is check our [Versions Page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-exp/versions) and our [Discord](https://discord.gg/8vqnCKxrgd)


Embark on a journey like never before and transform your Minecraft experience into a cinematic masterpiece with Axl0's Trailer Experience modpack!
